**Adding Login Functionality**

I'm focusing on integrating a "Login account Sky Children of the Light" feature into the "Play Now" button within the `Navbar`. The existing button in `Navbar.tsx` is inactive, so I'm looking into how to connect that button to initiate a user login flow, preferably, seamlessly linking this with the existing structure.


**Refining Login Workflow**

I'm now refining the login flow triggered by the "Play Now" button. It seems the user wants a direct login prompt upon clicking, so I'm moving toward a modal approach within `Navbar.tsx`. The login modal will include typical "Sky: Children of the Light" login options (Google, etc.) and I'll maintain the aesthetic consistency. I'm also ensuring the "Play Now" button in the Hero section and mobile menu will have the same effect. Finally, I'll use a local state to manage the visibility of the login modal in `Navbar.tsx`.


**Implementing Login Options**
